case_title: NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2005-1 VS. MELODY A KIRK ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2005-1 A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2005-1 A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S) AS TO DEFENDANT KIRK, MELODY A DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-2016
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-23-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-23-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
